'''hachobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacufuge|vacufuge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacufuge|vacufuge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hachobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæchebeth|hæchebeth]] || [[word:hæchebej|hæchebej]] || [[word:hæchebesh|hæchebesh]] || [[word:hæchebe|hæchebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hachochoboth|hachochoboth]] || [[word:hachochoboj|hachochoboj]] || [[word:hachochobosh|hachochobosh]] || [[word:hachochobo|hachochobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hachoboth|hachoboth]] || [[word:hachoboj|hachoboj]] || [[word:hachobosh|hachobosh]] || [[word:hachobo|hachobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hachofboth|hachofboth]] || [[word:hachofboj|hachofboj]] || [[word:hachofbosh|hachofbosh]] || [[word:hachofbof|hachofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hachobotho|hachobotho]] || [[word:hachobojo|hachobojo]] || [[word:hachobosho|hachobosho]] || [[word:hachoboko|hachoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hachoboth|hachoboth]] || [[word:hachoboj|hachoboj]] || [[word:hachobosh|hachobosh]] || [[word:hachobo|hachobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hachobothol|hachobothol]] || [[word:hachobojol|hachobojol]] || [[word:hachoboshol|hachoboshol]] || [[word:hachobokol|hachobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hachobothotho|hachobothotho]] || [[word:hachobojojo|hachobojojo]] || [[word:hachoboshosho|hachoboshosho]] || [[word:hachoboko|hachoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hachobothon|hachobothon]] || [[word:hachobojon|hachobojon]] || [[word:hachoboshon|hachoboshon]] || [[word:hachobokon|hachobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hachobothoro|hachobothoro]] || [[word:hachobojoro|hachobojoro]] || [[word:hachoboshoro|hachoboshoro]] || [[word:hachobokoro|hachobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
